title: InVlate
description: Lots of content to make Minecraft more challenging!
body:
**The InVlate mod** is perfect for all types of Minecraft players. Don't you need an _exciting_ and _long adventure_ where you have to _fight_, _craft_, _farm_, and _dig a lot_? Then InVlate is for you! With him, your world will become a little more complicated, but there will be several more worlds that you have to go through in order to... The mod has not been completed yet, so there are still two dimensions, but the passage will take at least several hours of play, and maybe even real days! Good luck! No riddles will stop you!
# Mod adds:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Lots of building blocks!**
![And many other blocks...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f453f5044667b04ca9cada32e4e6a0c8d9fa3507.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**More than 600 different items and blocks!**
![Full sets of armor, as well as some tools, can give different effects or abilities!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60595d08b84452991fc16b7b5ffe372be4dc88cb.png)
</details>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Mysterious bosses with good loot!**
![Bosses are summoned either by summoners or by some actions in the world.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/511eef67545edebbfcc1198e914a918a7255adfb.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Several different measurements!**
![Beware of monsters!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d92b0923f21d7b642995b8887a928760ad6e7c48.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Anti-break mode!
![Anti-Break!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/345648c2e38ce3ea3dd4892a4bbef6cb8583f921.png)
</details>






# Updates and Must-Have Mods:
I RECOMMEND PLAYING ONLY THE LATEST VERSION!
The mod is updated very often, so you can get more and more content in each update!
The GeckoLib and Just Enough Items is required (with 1.2.1, both mods are not needed).
